text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 202 

RDLGY_DGNSTC_AMT 

LABEL: Radiology Diagnostic Amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for the radiology diagnostic services related to the 
beneficiary's stay. 

SHORT NAME: RDLGY_DGNSTC_AMT 

LONG NAME: RDLGY_DGNSTC_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center total charge
